attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
N_ERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
SRC.END_EXPENSE_DATE,
SRC.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS1,
SRC.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS1,
SRC.NUM_FREE_DINNERS1,
SRC.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES1,
SRC.PER_DIEM_RATE1,
SRC.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT1,
SRC.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS2,
SRC.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS2, 
SRC.NUM_FREE_DINNERS2,
SRC.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES2,
SRC.PER_DIEM_RATE2,
SRC.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT2,
SRC.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS3,
SRC.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS3,
SRC.NUM_FREE_DINNERS3,
SRC.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES3,
SRC.PER_DIEM_RATE3,
SRC.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT3,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
SRC.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE,
SRC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
SRC.CURRENCY_CODE,
N_SSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE GLOBAL_NAME,
SRC.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
SRC.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SRC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
SRC.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
SRC.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
SRC.REPORT_LINE_ID,
SRC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID 
FROM
(
SELECT 
END_EXPENSE_DATE,
NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS1,
NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS1,
NUM_FREE_DINNERS1,
NUM_FREE_LUNCHES1,
PER_DIEM_RATE1,
DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT1,
NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS2,
NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS2, 
NUM_FREE_DINNERS2,
NUM_FREE_LUNCHES2,
PER_DIEM_RATE2,
DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT2,
NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS3,
NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS3,
NUM_FREE_DINNERS3,
NUM_FREE_LUNCHES3,
PER_DIEM_RATE3,
DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT3,
ACTION_CODE,
CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
CURRENCY_CODE,
ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
REPORT_HEADER_ID,
REPORT_LINE_ID,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CATEGORY_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS 

UNION

SELECT 
END_EXPENSE_DATE,
NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS1,
NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS1,
NUM_FREE_DINNERS1,
NUM_FREE_LUNCHES1,
PER_DIEM_RATE1,
DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT1,
NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS2,
NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS2, 
NUM_FREE_DINNERS2,
NUM_FREE_LUNCHES2,
PER_DIEM_RATE2,
DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT2,
NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS3,
NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS3,
NUM_FREE_DINNERS3,
NUM_FREE_LUNCHES3,
PER_DIEM_RATE3,
DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT3,
ACTION_CODE,
CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
CURRENCY_CODE,
ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
REPORT_HEADER_ID,
REPORT_LINE_ID,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CATEGORY_CODE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_EXP_REP_LIN_PER_DIEM) SRC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE  N_ERL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SSC
WHERE 
SRC.REPORT_LINE_ID=N_ERL.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT
AND SRC.GLOBAL_NAME= N_SSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND N_SSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=N_ERL.BK_SS_CD
AND SRC.CATEGORY_CODE = 'PER_DIEM'

SELECT 
STG_MAERL.BATCH_ID,
STG_MAERL.CREATE_DATETIME,
STG_MAERL.ACTION_CODE,
STG_MAERL.ADJUSTMENT_REASON,
STG_MAERL.ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,
STG_MAERL.AMOUNT,
STG_MAERL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.AP_VALIDATION_ERROR,
STG_MAERL.ATTENDEES,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE11,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE12,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE14,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE15,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE2,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE3,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE4,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE5,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE6,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE8,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE9,
STG_MAERL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
STG_MAERL.AVG_MILEAGE_RATE,
STG_MAERL.AWARD_ID,
STG_MAERL.AWARD_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.AWT_GROUP_ID,
STG_MAERL.CATEGORY_CODE,
STG_MAERL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
STG_MAERL.COMPANY_PREPAID_INVOICE_ID,
STG_MAERL.COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY,
STG_MAERL.CREATED_BY,
STG_MAERL.CREATION_DATE,
STG_MAERL.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID,
STG_MAERL.CURRENCY_CODE,
STG_MAERL.DAILY_AMOUNT,
STG_MAERL.DAILY_DISTANCE,
STG_MAERL.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT1,
STG_MAERL.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT2,
STG_MAERL.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT3,
STG_MAERL.DESTINATION_FROM,
STG_MAERL.DESTINATION_TO,
STG_MAERL.DISTANCE_UNIT_CODE,
STG_MAERL.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.END_EXPENSE_DATE,
STG_MAERL.EXCHANGE_DATE,
STG_MAERL.EXCHANGE_RATE,
STG_MAERL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
STG_MAERL.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,
STG_MAERL.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,
STG_MAERL.EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
STG_MAERL.EXPENSE_GROUP,
STG_MAERL.FLEX_CONCATENATED,
STG_MAERL.FLIGHT_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.FUEL_TYPE,
STG_MAERL.FUNC_CURRENCY_AMT,
STG_MAERL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_NAME,
STG_MAERL.ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,
STG_MAERL.ITEMIZE_ID,
STG_MAERL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
STG_MAERL.JUSTIFICATION,
STG_MAERL.JUSTIFICATION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
STG_MAERL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_MAERL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
STG_MAERL.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
STG_MAERL.LOCATION,
STG_MAERL.LOCATION_ID,
STG_MAERL.LOCATION_TO_ID,
STG_MAERL.MERCHANT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.MERCHANT_NAME,
STG_MAERL.MERCHANT_REFERENCE,
STG_MAERL.MERCHANT_TAXPAYER_ID,
STG_MAERL.MERCHANT_TAX_REG_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.MILEAGE_RATE_ADJUSTED_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
STG_MAERL.NUMBER_PEOPLE,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS1,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS2,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS3,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS1,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS2,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS3,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_DINNERS1,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_DINNERS2,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_DINNERS3,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES1,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES2,
STG_MAERL.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES3,
STG_MAERL.NUM_PDM_DAYS1,
STG_MAERL.NUM_PDM_DAYS2,
STG_MAERL.NUM_PDM_DAYS3,
STG_MAERL.ORG_ID,
STG_MAERL.PA_INTERFACED_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.PA_QUANTITY,
STG_MAERL.PER_DIEM_RATE1,
STG_MAERL.PER_DIEM_RATE2,
STG_MAERL.PER_DIEM_RATE3,
STG_MAERL.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,
STG_MAERL.PROJECT_ID,
STG_MAERL.PROJECT_NAME,
STG_MAERL.PROJECT_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
STG_MAERL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
STG_MAERL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
STG_MAERL.RECEIPT_MISSING_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.REFERENCE_1,
STG_MAERL.REFERENCE_2,
STG_MAERL.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
STG_MAERL.REPORT_LINE_ID,
STG_MAERL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
STG_MAERL.START_EXPENSE_DATE,
STG_MAERL.STAT_AMOUNT,
STG_MAERL.SUBMITTED_AMOUNT,
STG_MAERL.TASK_ID,
STG_MAERL.TASK_NAME,
STG_MAERL.TASK_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.TAX_CODE_ID,
STG_MAERL.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
STG_MAERL.TICKET_CLASS_CODE,
STG_MAERL.TICKET_NUMBER,
STG_MAERL.TRAVEL_TYPE,
STG_MAERL.TRIP_DISTANCE,
STG_MAERL.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
STG_MAERL.USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT,
STG_MAERL.VAT_CODE,
STG_MAERL.VEHICLE_CATEGORY_CODE,
STG_MAERL.VEHICLE_TYPE,
STG_MAERL.WEB_PARAMETER_ID 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS STG_MAERL
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE  N_ERL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SSC
WHERE 
STG_MAERL.REPORT_LINE_ID=N_ERL.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT
AND STG_MAERL.GLOBAL_NAME= N_SSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND N_SSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=N_ERL.BK_SS_CD
AND  STG_MAERL.CATEGORY_CODE = 'PER_DIEM'
)
